home.heroTitle: The Art of Touch for Your Well-being
home.heroSub: Professional therapeutic and restorative massage in Stockholm. Recover energy, relieve pain, and find deep relaxation.
home.aboutText: Welcome! My name is Oleg. I am a certified massage therapist with years of professional experience. My goal is to help you release muscle tension, recover from physical activity, and restore inner balance. In my practice, I combine classical techniques with modern rehabilitation methods, tailoring the approach to each individual client's needs.

exp.title: Professionalism
exp.desc: Deep anatomical knowledge and certified massage techniques.

ind.title: Individual Approach
ind.desc: Selecting the optimal technique tailored to your specific needs and goals.

atm.title: Premium Atmosphere
atm.desc: A cozy treatment room, relaxing music, aromatherapy, and absolute comfort.

services.title: Services & Prices
services.sub: Choose the perfect treatment to restore your body and mind

classic.name: Classic Massage
classic.shortDesc: Traditional muscle relief to ease tension and improve overall physical tone.
classic.longDesc: Classic massage is the foundation of a healthy body. This treatment focuses on improving circulation, easing muscle stiffness, and reducing fatigue. Ideal for those with sedentary jobs or general physical exhaustion.

anti-cellulite.name: Anti-Cellulite Massage
anti-cellulite.shortDesc: Effective body contouring, lymphatic stimulation, and skin firming.
anti-cellulite.longDesc: An intensive manual technique focusing on target areas. This massage stimulates metabolism, promotes toxin elimination, and significantly enhances skin elasticity and smoothness.

sports.name: Sports Massage
sports.shortDesc: Deep muscle work for athletes and active individuals. Recovery and preparation.
sports.longDesc: A specialized technique for active individuals and athletes. It prepares muscles for heavy workouts, accelerates lactic acid removal, and helps prevent sports-related injuries.

lymphatic-drainage.name: Lymphatic Drainage Massage
lymphatic-drainage.shortDesc: Gentle detoxification, fluid release, and immune system support.
lymphatic-drainage.longDesc: A light, rhythmic technique aimed at accelerating lymphatic flow. This massage helps eliminate water retention, reduces swelling, and strengthens the body's natural defenses.

cupping.name: Cupping Therapy
cupping.shortDesc: Vacuum massage for deep fascia release and improved tissue nutrition.
cupping.longDesc: Vacuum cupping therapy stimulates blood flow to specific tissues, speeds up recovery, and targets deep trigger zones that are difficult to reach with hands alone.

hot-stone.name: Hot Stone Massage
hot-stone.shortDesc: Stone therapy for deep muscle warming and mental stress relief.
hot-stone.longDesc: Utilizes smooth basalt stones heated to a comforting temperature. The heat penetrates deep into muscle layers to melt away tension, while smooth gliding strokes guide you into a state of deep tranquility.

turkish-foam.name: Turkish Foam Massage
turkish-foam.shortDesc: A luxurious cleansing ritual in a cloud of warm, soft soap foam.
turkish-foam.longDesc: A traditional soap massage ritual. A special linen bag is used to create a vast cloud of warm foam covering the body. This is followed by a gentle massage and a Kese mitt scrub that exfoliates and renews the skin.

natural-massage.name: Natural Herbal Massage
natural-massage.shortDesc: Massage using natural organic oils and warm herbal compress bags.
natural-massage.longDesc: A signature technique rooted in natural healing. Includes aromatherapy with pure essential oils and body warming using gentle herbal compresses filled with organic therapeutic herbs.

testimonials.title: Client Reviews
testimonials.sub: What clients say about their experience with Oleg

items.name: Johan Andersson
items.text: Excellent sports massage! Oleg has a deep understanding of anatomy and helped me recover quickly after my marathon. Highly recommended!

items.name: Maria Nilsson
items.text: Classic massage by Oleg is the best remedy for neck and back pain after a long week of desk work. Extremely professional and gentle.

items.name: Elena Petrova
items.text: Hot stone massage was pure bliss. Total relaxation and reset. The treatment room is clean, cozy, and very comfortable.
